sections.paragraph:
Original: כּוּב

Transliteration: kûb

Phonetic: koob

BDB Definition:

Chub = "a horde"
  1. the name of a people in alliance with Nebuchadnezzar and probably located in northern Africa; maybe same as 'Lybia' or 'Lub'

Origin: of foreign derivation

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name
